title: No Creative Menu
description: A lightweight client-side mod that optimizes performance by allowing you to hide the vanilla creative inventory.
body:
# ❌ NoCreativeMenu

**NoCreativeMenu** is a lightweight, high-performance client-side utility for Minecraft that allows you to disable the vanilla creative inventory. Perfect for those who rely on external item browsers like JEI, REI, or EMI. For both Fabric and Neoforge

---

### 🚀 Why NoCreativeMenu?

In large modpacks, the vanilla creative menu becomes a source of **performance overhead**. To display thousands of items, Minecraft must populate dozens of tabs and build complex search trees every time you open the screen, leading to noticeable "lag spikes".

If you are already using **JEI, REI, or EMI**, the vanilla creative inventory is redundant. **NoCreativeMenu** stops that unnecessary rendering, saving CPU and RAM cycles for what truly matters: your gameplay.

### ✨ Features

- **Toggle on the Fly:** A clean button integrated into your inventory to switch between the full creative screen and the optimized survival-style inventory.
- **Configurable Placement:** Choose between **8 different corner presets** for the toggle button to avoid overlapping with other mod interfaces.
- **Performance Metrics:** For power users, the mod logs the exact initialization time (in ms) of each screen to the console, allowing you to see your performance gains.
- **For both Fabric and Neoforge**

![button functionality ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9184f899b80d8116c628412d1748453a5cce8fe0.gif)

### 🌍 Global Support

Fully localized for a global community:
- **English (US)**
- **Spanish (ES & LATAM)**
- **Portuguese (BR)**
- **Chinese (Simplified)**

### 📜 License & Credits

Developed by **Ixeken Studios** in México.  
Licensed under the **MIT License**. You are free to include this mod in any modpack!
